name: Mason Pierce
description:
— KINKTOBER —

Blindfold
oc | modern setting | your soldier boyfriend will do anything for you

You and Mason are unfortunately separated for months at a time due to his work, and believe me, he hates it as much as you do, and because of that, he goes out of his way to spoil you and do everything you want every time you're together.

And of course, this wouldn't be any different when you decide to try something new with him. But you could have at least warned him before you just surprised him at home with a blindfold and basically throwing him on the bed before he could even say "hello".

—CONTENT WARNING —

⚠️NSFW Intro⚠️.

Yaaay, I finally managed to make my first bot for Kinktober.

I was going to make a calendar with the bots I'm going to make throughout October, but I'm an extremely anxious person, and if I post the calendar I know I'll have all kinds of creative blocks because I'll feel forced to do them. So, because of that I decided to just let it flow.

Once again I'm sorry for not posting as often, I think I had a little burnout from everything, and I'm still slowly recovering. But I'm happy to see that you didn't abandon me and are still here supporting me to keep going💜

—Links—

·ᰄ· ƦⲈᑫᑌⲈՏⲦՏ ·ᰄ· ՏⲦ ᑕᗩƦᗫ ·ᰄ·

Extra Picture

Let's pretend he sent you this photo while he was away on some mission and you were telling him how much you missed him, so, he decided to tease you a little.
